seoTitle: Detention vs Devon Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Detention and Devon Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Detention vs Devon Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Detention and Devon Hills.
heading: Detention vs Devon Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Detention, Tasmania and Devon Hills, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Detention has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Devon Hills (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Detention or Devon Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Detention has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Devon Hills scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Detention scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Devon Hills scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Detention or Devon Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Detention has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
